overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a student character exploring a gothic castle interior at night. The character walks through candlelit corridors with vaulted ceilings, ascends a spiral stone staircase, passes through a grand hall with animated armor statues, and approaches a large illuminated wall map.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a long stone corridor with vaulted ceilings, passing framed portraits on the left wall

entered.detail: stone block wall with dark wood paneling and aged texture
high gothic ribbed vault ceiling with stone construction
large ornate framed painting of a figure in historical dress
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange light
tall arched window with diamond-patterned leaded glass glowing blue from moonlight outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic corridor with high vaulted ceilings. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates framed portraits on the left, while tall leaded glass windows on the right glow with cool blue moonlight.

events.description: character enters narrow spiral staircase from the main corridor

agents.ego_description: ascending a tight spiral stone staircase, following the curve of the tower wall

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps curving upward in a tight spiral
rough-hewn circular stone wall of the tower interior
iron wall-mounted lantern with warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone spiral staircase, ascending the winding steps as wall lanterns cast dancing shadows on the curved tower walls.

events.description: exits spiral staircase into upper corridor with different wall paneling
begins descending a short flight of stairs within the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through an upper corridor then descending a short stone staircase toward a lower level

entered.detail: stone wall with dark wood paneling and decorative trim
simple wooden bench against the corridor wall
short flight of stone steps leading downward

segments.scene_description: The character exits the spiral staircase into a quieter upper corridor with wooden benches, then descends a short flight of stone stairs toward a grand hall below.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with armor displays and grand fireplace

events.description: enters spacious great hall with high ceilings and armor statues
ascends wooden staircase with ornate railing

agents.ego_description: walking through a grand hall past animated armor statues, passing a large fireplace, then ascending a wooden staircase

notable_agents.action: animated suit of armor standing guard, glowing with blue magical light
animated suit of armor standing guard, glowing with blue magical light

entered.detail: large stone archway leading into the spacious hall
massive stone fireplace with glowing embers and ornate mantle
polished wooden stairs with carved banisters ascending to upper level
decorative wooden railing with turned balusters
large woven wall hanging depicting a scene

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling, passing two glowing blue suits of armor standing guard. The hall features a massive fireplace with warm embers. The character continues past the fireplace and ascends a polished wooden staircase with ornate railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: map room with large cartographic display

events.description: descends into carpeted corridor with red runner
stops walking to examine the large wall map

agents.ego_description: walking down a carpeted corridor toward a large illuminated map, then stopping to examine it closely

entered.detail: massive illuminated parchment map in ornate wooden frame showing geographical details
large potted plant with broad leaves

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a quieter corridor with a red carpet runner, approaching a massive illuminated wall map. The character stops before the map, which is displayed in an ornate wooden frame above a wooden bench, and examines it closely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior, transitioning from dimly lit corridors and winding stairs into a grand hall and finally toward a detailed wall map. It begins in a vaulted corridor where warm sconce light clashes with cool blue moonlight filtering through leaded glass windows. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow stone spiral staircase where lanterns cast dancing shadows, before opening into an upper hallway and descending toward a vast lower level. The camera then glides through a grand hall past glowing blue suits of armor and a flickering fireplace, ascending a polished wooden staircase before turning back down into a quiet, red-carpeted corridor. Finally, the movement slows as the character approaches and stops before a massive illuminated wall map housed in an ornate wooden frame.
